name: visuals-hybrid
title: Visuals Hybrid
description: Video Visuals Agent for production pipelines. Hybrid workflow: image-fetcher (royalty-free B-roll) primary + local-image-gen (Stable Diffusion) fallback with quality validation.
context: Use this agent for video production visuals: script-matched B-roll, thumbnails, overlays, social formats. Outputs organized /a0/usr/workdir/ folders with licensing metadata.
